name: Tuna & Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 12 ounces tuna in water, drained and flaked
1 cup frozen green peas, thawed and cooked
recipeInstructions:
Cook rotini according to package directions. Rinse with cold water and drain.
To prepare salad, combine tuna, rotini, peas, celery, bell peppers, and onions in a mixing bowl. Mix well.
To prepare dressing, combine mayonnaise, lemon juice, thyme, salt, and black pepper. Mix well.
Gently stir mixture into salad. Cover and refrigerate for 1 hour.
